message:
bd-2wds9: Verify combinator/rate_limit.rs audit (SOUND)

Stale agent abd8b1f flagged CRITICAL and HIGH severity issues.

Verification: NOT BUGS

1. CRITICAL (avg_wait_time calculation): NOT A BUG
   - Semantics are "average wait per started entry" - valid metric
   - total_waited increments at enqueue, total_wait_ms at completion

2. HIGH (queue memory leak): BY DESIGN
   - Standard async polling - caller must call check/cancel

3. HIGH (FixedWindow not implemented): INCOMPLETE FEATURE
   - Enum exists but algorithm field never branched on
   - Existing TokenBucket behavior works correctly

4. HIGH (SlidingWindow metrics): NOT A BUG
   - Lines 747, 751 DO update total_allowed/total_rejected
   - available_tokens=0 correct for window algorithm

Agent misunderstood metric semantics and algorithm design.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
